Sign Up
This February, it’s a Love Takeover!
The celebration starts in February with our month-long Love Takeover, when we’ll be celebrating Valentine’s Day and love in all its forms. The table is all set for a perfect night out.
Book your table early. Reservations are limited and vary by location.
Reserve Your Table
It’s Galentine’s at Melting Pot!
Grab your besties and get ready to celebrate Galentine’s at Melting Pot. It’s time for inside jokes and “remember when” moments with the besties that totally get you.
Reserve Your Galentine's
Our Locations
Find out for yourself why the Melting Pot is everyone’s favorite place for fun, frivolity, and fondue. Odds are, there’s a Melting Pot near you, so start making plans now for a great night out.
Find a Restaurant Nearby
Show the fam some love.
We specialize in bringing families together. Celebrate the people who love you, no matter what. The table is all set for a perfect night out.
Reserve Your Family Time
Fondue at Home
Now you can dip into shareable moments at home. No fondue pot needed!
Learn More
Our Commitment to Diversity & Inclusion
Learn More
Gift Cards & Shop
Take the guesswork out of gift-giving when you treat someone to fondue at the Melting Pot. A gift card from the Melting Pot never goes out of style.
Shop Now

meta.meta_description: Melting Pot is the original fondue restaurant where guests can enjoy several fondue cooking styles and a variety of unique entrees, salads, and indulgent desserts.
